mdRecord.dcterms:title: Fiduciary Accounts: Guardianship of Dolly Martin, ward turned 21 years of age 02.12.1896
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Guardianship of Dolly Martin, ward turned 21 years of age 02.12.1896 Martha A. Martin, Guardian Recorded in Ledger Book 4, page 443, in the Floyd County Courthouse.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
